command:
echo "=== TEST INTERNAL PATH (vm-claude-hub → vm-openclaw:8788) ==="
curl -s --max-time 8 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://192.168.0.199:8788/telegram-webhook
echo ""

echo "=== SEND SIMULATED TELEGRAM UPDATE to webhook ==="
# Inject a fake Telegram update to test the full path
curl -s --max-time 10 -X POST http://192.168.0.199:8788/telegram-webhook \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"update_id":999001,"message":{"message_id":1,"from":{"id":8869156588,"is_bot":false,"first_name":"Jose"},"chat":{"id":-1003955222520,"title":"DevilDollzLLC","type":"supergroup"},"date":1781617000,"text":"health check"}}' 2>&1
echo ""

echo "=== CHECK TELEGRAM WEBHOOK (fresh) ==="
sleep 3
python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request
tok = '8363191602:AAGVXfJKqNGNhyS-EuxEl8CKRcUyjqIGtPE'
r = urllib.request.urlopen(f'https://api.telegram.org/bot{tok}/getWebhookInfo', timeout=10)
d = json.loads(r.read())
wh = d.get('result', {})
print('url:', wh.get('url','NONE'))
print('pending_updates:', wh.get('pending_update_count', 0))
print('last_error:', wh.get('last_error_message', 'none'))
print('last_error_date:', wh.get('last_error_date', 0))
print('max_connections:', wh.get('max_connections', 0))
"

echo "=== VERIFY SOCAT SERVICE STATE ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 '
systemctl status remy-webhook-forwarder.service --no-pager | grep -E "Active|ExecStart|Main PID"
ss -tlnp | grep 8788
' 2>&1
